examples: He stared moodily into the fire.
He sat and stared moodily out the window.
He stood at the window, moodily staring out.
The book and lyrics by Cooper are enveloped in moodily dissonant music by Zach Redler that reflects the mental confusion of dementia.
Like many others in Finnish jazz, the band uses the music as a jumping-off point into experimentation that can range from the raucous to the moodily introspective.
